login.title: Kernel
login.subtitle: Your personal AI that remembers you. It gets smarter every time you chat.
login.hint: No credit card needed. 10 free messages every month.
login.feature1Desc: Kernel learns what you like, what you need, and how you talk. The more you use it, the better it gets.
login.feature2Desc: Ask anything. Kernel picks the right expert for you — whether you need research, code, writing, or advice.
login.feature3Desc: Get real answers from the internet, not old info. Kernel finds what you need and shows you where it came from.
login.feature4Desc: All your conversations are saved. Come back anytime, pick up where you left off, and keep everything organized.

modal.resetSent: Password reset link sent. Check your email.
modal.resetSentDesc: We sent a password reset link to {{email}}. Click the link in your email to set a new password.
modal.error: That didn't work. Check your credentials and try again.
modal.legalAgreement: By continuing, you agree to the

setPassword.title: Reset your credentials
setPassword.subtitle: Update your password, username, or email. Change one or all.
setPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
setPassword.successWithEmail: Changes saved. Check your new email for a confirmation link.

kernelGate.authFailed: That didn't work. Check your credentials and try again.
